_comment: STYLE_GUIDE.json — Remotion AI Editor style replication schema. Claude Code reads this file when editing to match the user's established editing style. Populate by analysing a reference video, then Claude Code applies every field automatically on all subsequent edits.

pacing._averageCutDurationNote: seconds per clip before cutting. slow=6+, medium=3-6, fast=1.5-3, very-fast=0.5-1.5

transitions._durationFramesNote: 0 for hard cut, 10-20 for dissolves or glitch

captions._wordsPerSecondNote: how fast captions appear. typical speech = 2.0-2.5

lowerThird._showAtFrameNote: frame to show lower third after clip starts
lowerThird._durationFramesNote: how long lower third stays on screen (150 = 5 seconds)

colorPalette._primaryNote: main brand color — used for accents, bars, highlights
colorPalette._accentNote: highlight color for stats, counters, key text

audioMix._fadeInDurationNote: frames to fade in music at start
audioMix._fadeOutDurationNote: frames to fade out music at end

_motionIntensityNote: 0-1. Controls spring animation mass and damping. 0=very gentle, 1=snappy/bouncy

zoomStyle._usePunchInNote: whether to zoom into clips for emphasis
zoomStyle._zoomScaleNote: how much to punch in. 1.0=no zoom, 1.05-1.15=subtle, 1.2+=dramatic

textOverlays._frequencyNote: 0=never, 0.5=half of clips get text, 1=every clip gets text

bRollStyle._beatSyncCutsNote: whether to snap cuts to audio beat markers
